title: Workshop Tour
description: A guided tour definition for the workshop-tour VS Code extension.

id.description: Stable identifier for the tour. Used to track active tour state.

title.description: Human-readable tour title shown in the side-bar.

description.description: Short summary of what the tour covers.

steps.description: Ordered list of steps the user walks through.

commands.description: Shell commands the user can copy or run from the step.

fileEdits.description: File edits the user can apply from the step.

label.description: Button label shown in the webview.

command.description: Shell command to copy or execute.

createFileEdit.description: Create a new file (or overwrite an existing one when `overwrite` is true).

path.description: Workspace-relative path of the file to create.

overwrite.description: If true, replace the file when it already exists. Defaults to false.

patchFileEdit.description: Patch an existing file by replacing the first occurrence of `find` with `replace`.

path.description: Workspace-relative path of the file to patch.

find.description: Anchor string to locate in the file.

replace.description: Replacement string substituted for the anchor.
